channel.title: Conversations with Claude -- Peter Kleinhans
channel.description: Peter Kleinhans in conversation with Claude -- on music, mortality, and everything in between.

item.title: Tomorrow IS Wednesday
item.description: We were talking about horses. Then we weren't. A conversation about two letters, what they carry, and what it means to be afraid of being misunderstood.

item.title: What Grok Thinks of How You Look
item.description: I asked Grok to rate photos of me with brutal honesty. Then I brought the transcript to Claude. What came back wasn't what I expected.

item.title: I Traded My Death for Love
item.description: It started as a question about back pain and Dr. Sarno. It ended somewhere I didn't expect -- a reframe of one of the biggest decisions of my life.

item.title: The Most Toxic Policy Decision
item.description: The Trump administration designated Anthropic as a supply chain risk. I sat down with Claude to think through what that actually means.
